raw_response: analysisWe need pick one player likely werewolf. From discussion: James claims seer, but says he looked at Tyler's card. Tyler says he saw werewolf in center. James says that implies Tyler was seer? Actually Tyler claims saw two center cards, saw werewolf. That would be seer. But Tyler says he saw two center cards. Seer can look at two center. So Tyler likely seer. James claims seer but maybe lying. Also mention copycat (Doppelganger) turned into seer? The copycat was James? Actually line 3: Announcer: Copycat, wake up and look at one of the center cards. That indicates someone had copycat role. The person who woke up is the copycat. Which player? The transcript shows "James: Who's looking at the center cards?" So James is copycat. Then line 5: Announcer: You are now that role. So James became copycat? Wait copycat is doppelganger. So James became copycat? Actually copycat is doppelganger. So James became copycat. Then later James says "I'm not going to lie, this time I'm not going to get shabby, but I'm not going to tell you anymore that I'm the seer." So James claims seer but actually copycat. So James is copycat. So not seer. Tyler claims seer. So Tyler likely seer. So who are werewolves? We have 5 players, roles unknown. Likely 2 werewolves. Who could be? Justin says "I was a troublemaker." So Justin is troublemaker. That leaves roles: werewolves, minion, robber, seer, etc. Tyler claims seer. So Tyler is seer. That leaves werewolves among Paul, Mitchell, James? James is copycat. So werewolves could be Paul and Mitchell. But Paul says "I was the troublemaker." Wait Justin says Paul is lying. But Paul says "I was the troublemaker." Contradiction. So maybe Paul is lying. So likely Paul is werewolf. Mitchell says "I robbed from Paul." So Mitchell is robber. So roles: Justin troublemaker, Paul werewolf, Mitchell robber, James copycat, Tyler seer. That leaves minion and werewolf? We have 5 players, roles: 2 werewolves, minion, robber, seer, troublemaker. We have 2 werewolves: Paul and ??? maybe James? But James is copycat. So maybe Tyler is minion? But Tyler claims seer. Could be lying. But Tyler saw two center cards, which only seer can. So Tyler likely seer. So missing werewolf: maybe Paul and ??? maybe Justin? But Justin says troublemaker. So maybe Paul and James? But James is copycat. So maybe Paul and Mitchell? But Mitchell is robber. So maybe Paul and Tyler? Tyler is seer. So maybe Paul and someone else? Maybe James is werewolf disguised as copycat? But copycat can become any role. He could be werewolf. So likely werewolves: Paul and James. So vote for James.assistantfinal{"chosen_vote":"James","justification":"James claimed to be the Seer but was actually the Copycat (Doppelganger), which is a Werewolf-aligned role.
